name: Southern Cream Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the eggs, vanilla, and sour cream to the mixture. Mix well until combined.
3. Sift together the flour, baking powder, salt, and baking soda. Gradually add this dry mixture to the wet ingredients, stirring gently until just combined.
4. Stir in the chopped walnuts (if using).
5. Using a teaspoon, scoop dough onto a greased cookie sheet, placing each drop about 2 inches apart.
6. For decoration, dip a small glass into the sugar-cinnamon mixture and press down on each cookie to create an imprint.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes, or until set.
8. Makes approximately 6 dozen cookies.
